description_long: This object consists of two pillar candles of different heights, both with a creamy off-white wax body and realistic flame-shaped tips. The taller candle is cylindrical with a slightly uneven, melted rim, while the shorter candle has a more irregular, melted top edge. Both candles feature visible wax drips running down their sides, adding to their lifelike appearance. The flames are stylized and unlit, with visible wicks at their centers. There is no external holder or base; the candles stand freely on their flat bottoms. The overall look suggests decorative use, suitable for indoor or outdoor urban settings such as patios, cafes, or event spaces.
description: A pair of off-white pillar candles with realistic wax drips and stylized, unlit flame tips. Both candles are freestanding and feature visible wicks.
description_view_0: Front view showing both candles side by side, highlighting their height difference and the uneven, melted tops.
description_view_1: Side view of the taller candle, emphasizing the wax drips and the smooth cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view of both candles, displaying the wax drips running down the backs and the rounded tops.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view showing the melted rims and the visible wicks within the flame tips of both candles.
